Chicken Serum

Mon Apr 06 2026 20:00:00 GMT-0400 (Eastern Daylight Time)

This morning, Yoshi's guest lecture on the hormonal basis of coloration and communication, androgen mediation of carotenoids. Fuck! that! I don't care about any of that except chicken serum! I never knew there was such a thing. No one ever told me. No one in the class seemed to even care. Or maybe everyone already knew and I was just the stupid chud who didn't know about chicken serum.
